utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all six keys. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 
- property: Includes address, neighborhood, features (beds/baths/basement/kitchen/garage/area), school district, and price. Fully specified.
- financing: Provides type (traditional mortgage), amount (CAD 736,000), LTV (80%), lender (RBC), pre-approval status, timeline (5-7 business days), arrangement fee (CAD 1,200), and closing timeline (45 days). Terms are outlined though interest rate/amortization not specified; however, the item asks for terms, and the provided terms (amount, LTV, fees, timelines) are present. Considered sufficiently specified.
- legal_services: Provider, package, assigned lawyer, cost (CAD 1,200), inclusions (due diligence, contract review, title search, closing coordination, mortgage document prep), and timeline (3 weeks). Fully specified.
- moving_services: Provider, service level, cost (CAD 650), inclusions, route with from/to addresses and distance, duration (1 day), timing (coordinated with closing). Fully specified.
- setup_services: Utilities listed (electricity, gas, water/sewer/waste), providers named, cost (CAD 120), scheduling timing (closing date). Fully specified.
- total_budget: Provides itemized amounts for property purchase, closing costs with breakdown (land transfer tax, legal fees, survey, title insurance, inspection), repeats legal/moving/utility costs, total investment, and buffer vs budget. Minor duplication of legal fees both inside closing costs and again as Legal Services line could imply double-counting; however, it is still a complete cost breakdown as presented. Thus, all six items are present and sufficiently detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution mentions specific selections that correspond to categories in the ground-truth ratings. We need to map each referenced item to the exact entry name in the ratings and return its numeric rating. The solution includes: financing 'Traditional mortgage' which corresponds to 'Traditional Mortgage' under purchase_financing; legal_services 'Premium package' corresponds to 'Premium Legal Package' under essential_legal_services; moving_services 'Standard service' corresponds to 'Standard Moving' under moving_services; setup_services 'Basic utilities package' corresponds to 'Basic Utilities' under utility_setup. The property itself (1523 Glen Forest Drive) is not listed among the ground-truth purchase_properties options, so it has no rating to map.

final_package_text:
{
    "property": "1523 Glen Forest Drive, Glen Abbey, Oakville - 4 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, finished basement, large gourmet kitchen, master ensuite, two-car garage with workshop space, 145m² contemporary home in Oakville Trafalgar High School district - CAD $920,000",
    "financing": "Traditional mortgage CAD $736,000 (80% LTV) through RBC Royal Bank of Canada, pre-approval initiated using existing joint account, 5-7 business day timeline, arrangement fee CAD $1,200, 45-day closing timeline",
    "legal_services": "Oakville Legal Partners premium package - Michael Chen, Partner assigned - CAD $1,200 includes full due diligence, priority service, contract review, title search, closing coordination, mortgage document preparation, 3-week legal review process",
    "moving_services": "Oakville Family Movers standard service - CAD $650 includes professional movers, packing materials, furniture protection for local move from 1247 Maple Grove Avenue to 1523 Glen Forest Drive (8.2 km), 1-day service coordinated with closing date",
    "setup_services": "Basic utilities package - CAD $120 includes electricity transfer (Alectra Utilities), natural gas connection (Enbridge Gas), municipal water/sewer/waste transfer, all scheduled for closing date",
    "total_budget": "Property Purchase: CAD $920,000, Closing Costs: CAD $16,550 (including land transfer tax CAD $13,950, legal fees, survey CAD $650, title insurance CAD $350, home inspection CAD $400), Legal Services: CAD $1,200, Moving Services: CAD $650, Utility Setup: CAD $120, TOTAL INVESTMENT: CAD $938,520 (within CAD $950,000 budget with CAD $11,480 buffer remaining)"
}
